text:
NAME: AGNCY_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
251300000X: Local education agency (LEA) 
251B00000X: Case management 
251C00000X: Day training, developmentally disabled services 
251E00000X: Home health 
251F00000X: Home infusion 
251G00000X: Hospice care, community based 
251J00000X:
